---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new AfroChain capability or workflow
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What user, protocol, validator, or developer problem are we solving?

## Proposed change

Describe the new feature or improvement.

## Scope

- protocol
- consensus
- vm / contracts
- sdk / cli
- wallet / mobile
- explorer / dashboard
- docs / operations

## Success criteria

What should exist or work when this is done?

## Risks or tradeoffs

List any migration, security, economics, or UX concerns.
